description: The ScaleObjectManager component is used to create a field of objects with different relative sizes. This is used most prominently in the "Size of the Universe Adventure" world.

methods.OnPlaceAtOptimalDistance: Called when the Place At Optimal Distance button is touched.
methods.ResetFarAwayObjects: Called when the Reset Far Away Objects button is touched.
methods.OnRandomizeLocations: Called when the Randomize Locations button is touched.
methods.AlignAll: Called when the Align All button is touched.
methods.OnGenerateTestObjects: Called when the Generate Test Objects button is touched.
methods.UpdateAll: Called when the Update All button is touched.
